title: TimeoutPolicy
description: Timeout policy configuration per Addendum 9.5.X - blocking states MUST have explicit timeouts

policy_id.description: Unique identifier for this timeout policy

state.description: The blocking state this policy applies to

timeout_action.description: Action to take when timeout is reached

escalation_target.description: Who to escalate to (required if timeout_action is ESCALATE_TO_HUMAN)
